title: VS Encumbrance
description: Applies various effects to players and vehicles based on VS Mass
body:
# (This mod is currently in early development. Expect widespread changes between beta versions).

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/622ced09939857be4b0c965511342a480ca3d33d_0.webp)


## Utilizing VS Mass data to expand gameplay.
![Example of Carrying Capacity HUD object.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a20092203973d82adde4a62a44e659bba96dadcb.png)

As you carry heavier blocks, your movement and mining speed are reduced after reaching a threshold, encouraging smarter inventory management and more immersive gameplay. (Think Skyrim encumbrance system, highly inspired).

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b89c0bd22442b219fb033694e5f6b8cf16cdf70_0.webp)

Furthermore, the contents of chests on VS ships now dynamically effect the weight distribution and total weight of the ship.

<iframe width="280" height="155" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sGxw3PoXJNM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod also includes weight shifting based on player weight. Carrying more shifts the weight.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YgFgZXIWEFA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The mod also includes the Pack Mule enchantment for chestplates, which increases your carrying capacity by raising the soft cap.

Have feedback? Want to make recommendations? Join here: https://discord.gg/q969xjEZ
VS Encumbrance integrates with:
Minecraft Forge, Valkyrien Skies 2 (for block mass data)

All trademarks and mod names belong to their respective owners.
